title: crotalaria macrocalyx
intro: Crotalaria macrocalyx, also known as the African rattle box or bush calabar bean, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria macrocalyx include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to act as an antimicrobial agent. The plant is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and the seeds are crushed to release their medicinal compounds, which are then used in various herbal preparations.
